channel.title: Daniel Campbell Blog
channel.description: Writing on GraphRAG, recommender systems, agentic finance workflows, and enterprise AI platforms.

item.title: Designing source-scoped GraphRAG for financial datarooms
item.description: Immutable source manifests, temporal facts, conflict handling, and citation-verifiable retrieval.

item.title: From ANN recall to reciprocal investor matching
item.description: Candidate generation, profile compaction, preference deltas, contextual bandits, and high-trust ranking.

item.title: Evaluating agentic finance workflows without hand-waving
item.description: Leakage tests, as-of-date reasoning, numeric routing, source replay, and prompt/model versioning.
